lifecycleScripts.afterStart: wp-env run cli wp rewrite flush && wp-env run tests-cli wp --skip-plugins --skip-themes --url=http://localhost:8891 db query "INSERT INTO wp_blogs (blog_id,site_id,domain,path,registered,last_updated,public,archived,mature,spam,deleted,lang_id) VALUES (1,1,'localhost:8891','/',NOW(),NOW(),1,0,0,0,0,0) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE blog_id=1"
